Psychologists classify human personalities into many groups, and every individual falls in
this group in one or the other way. This method is helpful in understanding human beings &
also the functioning of their minds.
This is nothing new as far as Indian astrology is concerned. Indian saints & Rishis have
used & documented this system of classifying people in clusters, and have used them to
predict human life & life patterns. Of course these ancient rules are modernised to suit the
present scenario, and one who does that invariably becomes a good astrologer.
This science isn’t 100 per cent perfect as any other Western science, but arguably perfect
up to 90 per cent.
Here we give a list of planets that are exhibited in one’s chart, and the characteristics that
each planet will enforce on a person, who has it as a dominating one..
In a chart if ….
